[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000010 1
1 10000000 1
2 10011000 3
3 10100000 2
4 00000010 1
5 10000000 1
6 10011000 3
7 10100000 2

01 10 10000000 1 match 1 5
12 21 10000001 2
23 32 10000101 3
34 43 10000001 2
45 54 10001000 2
56 65 10010000 2
67 76 00010010 2
70 07 00000000 a

02 20 10000000 1 match 1 5
13 31 10000011 3
24 42 10000001 2
35 53 10000100 2
46 64 10000000 1 match 1 5
57 75 00011000 2
60 06 10000000 1 match 1 5
71 17 00011010 3

14 41 10001001 3
25 52 10000100 2
36 63 10000010 2
47 74 00001000 1
50 05 10000000 1 match 1 5
61 16 10010010 3
72 27 00000000 a

04 40 10000000 1 match 1 5
15 51 10011000 3 match 2 6
26 62 10100000 2 match 3 7
37 73 00000010 1 match 0 4
